docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF LOST ORIGINAL WRITTEN RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, EDMUND
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MESSARA, AHCENE DOES 1 TO X

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, EDMUND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MESSARA, AHCENE DOES 1 TO X THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1878-9TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122 (COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO), ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, EDMUND AS TO DEFENDANT MESSARA, AHCENE DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SERVE BY POST AND MAIL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, EDMUND SERVED MAY-27-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MESSARA, AHCENE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, EDMUND SERVED MAY-27-2014, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MESSARA, AHCENE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MESSARA, AHCENE
